items.name_en: 🆕 M237 Grey [Top-tier Original] Dynamic Code Syncs with Counter. The Pochette Louise chain bag renews the classic design with a new proportion. Exquisite glossy Epi leather or stylish matte leather shapes the bag, securely storing essentials for night outings. Paired with a lustrous chain, it can be elegantly carried over the shoulder or in hand. 22 x 14 x5

items.name_en: 🆕 Upgraded Version⚠️ M14194 White & Color! Collaboration Takashi Murakami! Nano Diane Baguette. The Nano Diane in Monogram Empreinte leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and strap-style magnetic closure. Its removable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.

items.name_en: 🆕 Haiyuan External Order【Real Owner】Dynamic Chip M13089 White & Color M12925 Monogram. This All InBB Xph Handbag features Monogram canvas paired with glossy metalware, highlighting a classic style with a signature lock and nameplate. The adjustable shoulder strap continues the brand's trunk-making heritage, while the leather strap adds options for cross-body and shoulder carrying. The foldable design allows for flexible shape adjustment, offering ample space for daily use.

items.name_en: 💰, High Version
items.name_cn:
💰, High Version
[New Mermaid Lace ❤ Medium]
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
This Book Tote bag, inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It accommodates various daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model Number: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_en: 🌟Moon Full Sheepskin Handbag
items.name_cn:
🌟Moon Full Sheepskin Handbag
This Moon bag is designed with imported lambskin, and the lining is also fully sheepskin.
Comes with a 100cm detachable and adjustable leather long strap, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder, and a detachable leather key fob. Front triangular logo magnetic snap/button closure. Lightweight and practical!
Size: 22.5x16x7.5cm
Model: 1BA381 Sheepskin

items.name_en: Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:

Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
Size: 20*25*10.5cm, Model: 7463

items.name_en: 💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
items.name_cn:
💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁

items.name_en: Original leather
items.name_cn:
Original leather
11050A
Nappa leather Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature knotted bow. This version is made of Nappa leather.
Flamenco can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, or an A5 notebook, a 0.5L bottle, and sunglasses case
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch
Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Gold suede lining
Loewe hot-stamped or hot-pressed 30-19-24

items.name_en: Genuine leather
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
New arrival Soft Calfskin
*1776 Large Leather Flamenco Purse
The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design inspired by the Flamenco series aesthetic, reinterpreting signature details like the side knots and donut chain in a larger proportion. This large version is made of soft Nappa lambskin with matching metal hardware.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap
Removable donut chain, embellished with Anagram Pebble
Exquisite magnetic snap closure
Size 41-26-9
